title: New quality metric in the BackBox algorithm: the delivery deadline
bodyHtml:
Introducing a new quality metric in the BackBox algorithm: the delivery deadline.

At Back Market, we understand that offering fast and reliable delivery is a commitment that can impact your operational costs. However, we also recognize the significant effect it has on customer satisfaction and conversion. 

To recognize your effort and encourage excellence in service, we’re implementing a bonus system for sellers who set up the fastest delivery deadlines and fulfil them.

How does it work? The bonus amount depends on the:
  • BackBox price 
    • For a 350 € product, the bonus in the BackBox algorithm is 3.30 € if you reduce the standard from 3 to 2 days. This means you can sell the product for 3.30 € more and still win the BackBox.
    • For a 700 € product, the bonus in the BackBox algorithm is 6.60 €. You can sell the product for 6.60 € more and still win the BackBox.
  • Deadline
    • When you set up a 24-hour delivery deadline instead of the usual 3-day delivery for a product that’s 350 €, the bonus is 6.60 €. You can sell the product for 6.60 € more and still win the BackBox.

This new metric is designed to reward you when you reduce delivery deadlines and help you maintain a high standard of punctuality. 

You’re rewarded if you keep your usual delivery deadline and ship on time instead of indicating a shorter delivery deadline but shipping late.

If you have the capability to reduce your delivery deadlines and keep up with on-time shipping, we encourage you to do so!
